summary: A clipped CNBC live hit of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling reacting to April's jobs report, calling Trump's economy 'resilient' and noting the print nearly doubled expectations. Standard single-shot broadcast talking-head with CNBC bug, 'ACTING LABOR SEC. ON JOBS REPORT' chyron and a running stock ticker; no music or stylized editing despite the high music_score. Out of scope: lightly-clipped TV news interview, not produced spectacle.
notable_text: ACTING LABOR SEC. ON JOBS REPORT; KEITH SONDERLING ACTING LABOR SECRETARY; CNBC; BREAKING NEWS
